column1: # --- MODEL (must match src/kernels.cuh; loader aborts on mismatch) ---
# NELX: elements along the arm length (x) [kNelx]
# NELY: elements through the arm height (y) [kNely]
# POISSON_NU: Poisson's ratio (0.40 not 0.49 - Q4 locking
# TENDON_BIAS_N: co-contraction pretension per tendon (N); 2*bias ~ 51% of the buckling load [kTendonBiasN]
# PROBE_DELTA_T_N: tension differential (N) used to identify the tip Jacobian
# CONTROL_SUBSTEPS: dynamics steps per control tick (100 x 3e-5 s = 3 ms -> ~333 Hz)
# HOLD_STEPS: dynamics steps held per setpoint (~2.0 s ~ 4 first-mode periods)
# PI_MARGIN_ALPHA: Kp = alpha/|J|; resonant loop gain ~ alpha/(2*zeta) ~ 0.7 < 1 (no sustained ring)
# PI_INTEGRAL_TIME_S: Ki = Kp/Ti (s); crossover ~ alpha/Ti = 2 rad/s
# DELTA_T_CLAMP_FRAC: |deltaT| <= frac * TENDON_BIAS_N (keeps both tendons taut: bias-clamp/2 > 0)
# SETPOINT_SAFE_FRAC: setpoint scale = J * frac * clamp (stays inside the identified range)
# SETPOINT_FRACS: setpoint sequence (fractions of the safe scale
